title: Gentle Ways to Calm Your Toddler for Bedtime
description: Struggling to calm an overtired toddler before bed? Try establishing a soothing pre-bedtime routine with activities like warm baths, gentle music, and reading together. For a personal touch, consider playing a bedtime story in your own recorded voice using NinniTales, giving your little one comfort as they drift off. Create a peaceful atmosphere, minimize screen time, and enjoy quality moments together before sleep. Start creating cozy bedtime habits tonight! #CalmBeforeBed #ToddlerSleep #BedtimeRoutine

description: Bedtime can be tough when your toddler is overtired.
